name: com.andreleandrodev.assetsusage
description:
Editor-only tool that scans your project and reports how many times each asset is referenced, surfacing unused assets at the top.

▪ Reference-counts assets by GUID across scenes, prefabs, materials and .meta files
▪ Folder and asset-type filters, sort by least or most used
▪ CSV export
▪ Scans on background threads to keep the editor responsive

Open via Tools > Assets Usage.
